payload.title: Conflict-resolution rules (LWW scalars, union sets, tombstones, numbering)
payload.description:
Write down and implement the conflict-resolution rules so concurrent edits converge deterministically.

## Rules
- Scalar fields: last-writer-wins by canonical order (ts, then ULID id).
- Additive sets (tickets, comments): grow-only union.
- Removals (relation.remove, ticket.delete): tombstone events; deletes are terminal.
- Ticket numbering: identity = ULID; the human KEY-N is a display number de-collided at replay (earliest creator keeps it; latecomer bumped to max+1).

## Acceptance
- Documented merge-semantics (ADR) + property test: shuffled divergent event set projects to the same board.
